scenarios.name: Validate orders.csv ingestion pipeline
scenarios.rationale: Baseline rolls its own per-row pydantic checks; treatment uses DataFrameModel with strict+coerce Config, @pa.check_types loader and catches pa.errors.SchemaError with failure_cases.

scenarios.name: Custom IQR outlier check on a Polars users schema
scenarios.rationale: Baseline computes IQR manually and never touches Pandera; treatment registers a check via extensions.register_check_method and validates a Polars DataFrame through pandera.polars DataFrameModel.validate.
